# GitLab CODEOWNERS with sections and default owners.

[Documentation] @docs-team
docs/
*.md

[Backend] @backend-team
/src/api/
/src/api/payments/ @payments-team

[Security] @sec-team
/src/api/payments/

# Optional section: its owners must NOT count toward ownership.
^[Optional Reviewers] @optional-team
/src/
